text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and I are about to head back after a
day out.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, looks like it's fixin' to rain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just a quick shower, so it shouldn't last long. I
duck under a nearby roof for some shelter...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Got no umbrella, so there's nothin' to do
but enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' in the rain is something else! It's way
different from swimming in a pool! It's more like...
runnin' underwater!
choice_data_list: You're going to catch a cold!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't ya worry your pretty little head about that!
See, I don't catch colds!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Splaaash! Keep it comin', rain clouds!
choice_data_list: I'll just have to make you stop!
First one to the station wins!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that right? Ya wanna go, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to match Taiki's sheer strength, I just end
up getting soaked as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after that, she turns up at the academy
feeling right as rain... I, unfortunately, have a
cold.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! Just so ya know, I don't plan on losin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An energetic Taiki Shuttle goes running off
toward a nearby building.
